segments.scene_description: Walking steadily along a multi-lane highway bridge with concrete railings on the left and moderate vehicle traffic passing by on the right. The bridge stretches toward the distant mountain, with street lights lining the walkway and the ocean visible below to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a static coastal overlook into a steady walk along a bustling highway bridge. It begins at a railing overlooking a sandy beach and calm ocean waters, with a rocky cliff formation visible to the left. As the camera turns right, the perspective shifts to a concrete walkway, revealing the imposing silhouette of Mount Chiliad in the far distance. The scene then expands into a steady forward progression along the multi-lane bridge, where street lights line the path and moderate vehicle traffic flows past on the right. Finally, the camera continues toward the distant mountain while the ocean remains visible below the railings to the left.
